Showroom R2.1 Announcement

Showroom R2.1 is coming on June 1st!  

New features of this much-anticipated update include:

 More flyable ships
 New jetpack
 Single-player ground racing
 Updated dogfighting arena
 Marketplace integration
 Other surprises

Need a game key? Check out ⁠No Access for more details on how to get one!

 | Wishlist us here: https://store.epicgames.com/en-US/p/star-atlas-bead34
